scripts.check: node -e "const http = require('http'); const req = http.request({hostname:'localhost',port:3001,path:'/api/health'}, (res) => { console.log('서버 상태:', res.statusCode); process.exit(res.statusCode === 200 ? 0 : 1); }); req.on('error', () => { console.log('서버가 실행되지 않음'); process.exit(1); }); req.end();"
